packages.title: Per day
packages.description: Flexible collaboration for workshops, quick design iterations, or rapid prototypes.

packages.title: 20 days
packages.description: Make an impact in a short period by designing or redesigning specific aspects or features of your product.

packages.title: 40 days
packages.description: A close, lasting collaboration to revamp your product extensively or create something new.

designSprint.title: Design Sprint
designSprint.description: Validate the direction of your project within days, not months. Ideal for non-validated ideas or new concepts. By the end of the week, you'll know exactly what to build.
features: Go from idea to validated concept in just 4 days
Structured process based on the Google Design Sprint
Real user feedback before you write a single line of code
Aligned team vision and clear next steps

days.title: Understand
days.tagline: Map the problem, explore the landscape

days.title: Ideate
days.tagline: Choose a direction, sketch the solution

days.title: Build
days.tagline: Turn the concept into something real
deliverables: Prototype that feels like the real thing

days.title: Validate
days.tagline: Test with real users, prove the direction
deliverables: Kickstart of your product or features
